diagrams

This script is meant to be used to draw all the technical diagrams for this project. This includes:

  • Silva-Steensgard Theory

  • Toplevel Schematics

  • Digital Architecture

  • Main State Machine

  • Analog Comparator

  • SAR Logic

  • FPGA/PCB Floorplanning

Functions
draw_digital_architecture
def draw_digital_architecture(
filename
 = 
'digital.png'
)

Draw and saves the ADC digital architecture

Parameters
filename

the name of the PNG file in ./docs/docs/img that will be saved

draw_adc_loop
def draw_adc_loop(
filename
 = 
'adc_loop'
)

Draws the Silva-Steensgard ADC loop used in the design

draw_digital_filter
def draw_digital_filter(
filename
 = 
'dig_filter.png'
)

Draw incremental filters (implemented as up-counters with resets)

draw_uvm_tb
